features: Straight cut carbon steel compound action blades

description: Product Description Straight cut carbon steel compound action blades with non-slip faces. Heavy duty handles with slip guards. The Redline Tool range for Draper Tools delivers quality guaranteed tools at affordable prices with the full backing of the Draper brand. The affordable prices are achieved without compromising on quality. This comprehensive and growing range includes tools to tackle most tasks. Every Draper Redline tool is manufactured to high standards that are strictly controlled by the companies quality control engineers. Draper Tools is a family owned company that has been selling high quality tools in the United Kingdom and beyond since 1919. The companies team of buyers travel the world sourcing new and innovative products which adhere to strict ethical and quality standards whilst ensuring that by controlling costs and buying in volume are also competitively priced.
